name: Mcdonald's Apple Mcmuffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Skimmed or reconstituted, non-fat dry milk
recipeInstructions:
Can use 4 tablespoons yogurt and 2 teaspoons applesauce for more moist muffins.
Grease 12 muffin wells.
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Combine all ingredients in a medium mixing bowl using a mixer on medium speed until completely combined.
Stir into the self-rising flour only, until the flour is completely moistened and dissolved. Do not overmix; avoid beating it like a cake batter so that muffins are not heavy or dry after baking.
Divide the batter equally among the 12 prepared muffin wells.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until a tester inserted comes out clean.
Let cool for a few minutes before loosening and removing from muffin tins.
